title: Windows Event Log Clearing
description: Detects clearing of Windows event logs via wevtutil or PowerShell. Attackers clear logs to destroy evidence of their activities and hinder forensic investigation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*wevtutil.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*cl Security*' or 'Command Line' like '*cl System*' or 'Command Line' like '*cl Application*' or 'Command Line' like '*clear-log*')) or (('Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*pwsh.exe') and 'Command Line' like '*Clear-EventLog*'))
falsepositives: Legitimate log maintenance during disk space emergencies
